name: nightly-build
description: Nightly build session: prototypes, tooling, improvements
prompt: Run the nightly build. Phase 1: Check for explicit requests from today, then work through backlog priorities (P1-2 first). Ship code, commit, verify. Phase 2: Review cron errors, token usage, signal flow quality. Fix quick wins, log the rest to backlog. Write progress to daily notes. Run memory hygiene (trim MEMORY.md to 200 lines, promote stable items to vault).
